title: 2026/04  Daily Trading Value/Volume of 0050
notes: Symbols for Direction:+/-/ X represent Up/Down/Not compared.

“**” in the mark column indicates that the trading resumption price has been proportionally adjusted from the most recent trading price due to a par value change (for stocks) or a split/reverse split (for ETFs).
Today statistics cover regular trading, Odd-lot, After-hour Fixed Price, Block trading, but exclude Auction and Tender offers.
If the last digit of the 6 digit alphanumeric ETF security code is K, M, S or C, it is traded in foreign currency.
